InfoItems.Title: Notice
InfoItems.Description: Please note that as Dubai continues to enhance itself as a holiday destination, there are many exciting hotel and leisure infrastructure developments currently underway to ensure that the Emirate remains at the forefront of advancement to meet the anticipated future demand of the discerning traveller.  Areas including Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, Habtoor City, Jumeirah Beach Residence and The Palm are part of an evolving landscape that over the years has continued to provide award winning tourism developments and facilities and is continuing for the foreseeable future.

InfoItems.Title: Notice
InfoItems.Description: Please note that children under the age of 5 are only allowed to use main swimming pools with mandatory presence of an adult guardian inside the pool. Children must wear swimming vests

InfoItems.Title: Notice
InfoItems.Description: Please be advised that there will be a Tourism Tax payable per room per night at the hotel.

InfoItems.Title: Notice
InfoItems.Description: Please ensure you select the room type and board basis you wish to avail for the duration of your stay.

InfoItems.Title: Notice
InfoItems.Description: Travelling during Ramadan: Ramadan is a wonderfully cultural time to visit. Visitors to a Muslim country are advised outside of hotels to respect those fasting by refraining from eating, drinking & smoking in public in daylight hours and to wear modest dress. Restaurants and bars are no longer screened off however some opening hours may be adjusted. Within hotels, Malls and most excursions, operation will be as usual.

InfoItems.Title: Notice
InfoItems.Description: Please be inform that in the event of cancellation of existing bookings, there will be no reconfirmation under the same guest’s name.
